description: Add tool group annotations to the Linear plugin so its 15 tools render in organized sections in the side panel.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/linear && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add group field to all Linear plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want Linear plugin tools organized into logical groups in the side panel so I can quickly find the tool I need among 15 tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Every defineTool() call in plugins/linear/src/tools/ includes a group field
Issues group (5 tools): create_issue, get_issue, update_issue, delete_issue, search_issues
Teams & Users group (3 tools): list_teams, get_viewer, list_users
Workflow group (3 tools): list_workflow_states, list_cycles, list_labels
dist/tools.json contains the group field on every tool after build
cd plugins/linear && npm run build passes
cd plugins/linear && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/linear && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/linear && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Add `group` to each `defineTool()` call in the 15 tool files under plugins/linear/src/tools/. The field goes after `icon` (or after `description` if no icon). Each file has exactly one defineTool call.

Group assignments:

**Issues** — `group: 'Issues'`:
- plugins/linear/src/tools/create-issue.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/get-issue.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/update-issue.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/delete-issue.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/search-issues.ts

**Comments** — `group: 'Comments'`:
- plugins/linear/src/tools/create-comment.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-comments.ts

**Projects** — `group: 'Projects'`:
- plugins/linear/src/tools/get-project.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-projects.ts

**Teams & Users** — `group: 'Teams & Users'`:
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-teams.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/get-viewer.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-users.ts

**Workflow** — `group: 'Workflow'`:
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-workflow-states.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-cycles.ts
- plugins/linear/src/tools/list-labels.ts

Do NOT modify plugins/linear/src/tools/schemas.ts — it contains shared Zod schemas, not tool definitions.

The plugin SDK already has the `group` field on ToolDefinition (added by a prior change). The Linear plugin imports from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk which resolves to the local workspace version.
